title: GhostMod: Rule Britannia
body:
![GhostMod: Rule Britannia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba89f3816f3ca6d9af25b8551efa090441e07854.png)

Focused around Minecolonies, Create, Immersive Engineering, and a host of exploration mods, this modpack guarantees a fun and historical\* experience!

Explore the vast, beautiful continents and vibrant biomes offered by Tectonic, Continents, Oh the Biomes We've Gone, William Wythers, and more. Invesigate and loot interesting structures and dungeons, and collect the powerful loot inside. Plus, no need to worry about your friends taking all the good relics, with instanced per-player loot chests from Lootr! More loot may be added in a later update.

Colonize using MineColonies, building vast towns and kingdoms with ease, populated by citizens that can build, craft, farm, mine, and more. Now with lots more styles from StyleColonies!

Industrialize with Create v6, the largest create update since the last create update! Now integrated with Immersive Engineering for the ultimate industrial-steampunk experience without some immersion-breaking tech mods I could mention.

By popular demand, you can now marry villagers with Minecraft Comes Alive! _Still trying to get the villagers more period-accurate clothing, please open a feature request if you know how!_

### System Interactions Alert
This pack uses [FancyMenu System Interactions Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu-system-interactions-addon) to install additional files that I was unable to include in the .mrpack. To install the additional files, select `Updater...` on the main menu, then select `Update Pack`. Wait until the game unfreezes, then relaunch the game. If you are using a well-made modpack launcher like PrismLauncher, ATLauncher, etc. you should only have to do this the first time you install the pack. 

If you wish to look at all of the URLs yourself, they are located at config/fancymenu/customization/updater_layout.txt

\*_Note: not guaranteed to be historically accurate in any regard._
